span.p: ① 組裝 Rich Prompt（全部 inline）

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
━━ PRODUCT INFO ━━
Description: CHIP RESISTOR...
MFG Part: RC0603FR-0710KL

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Encoding Fields:
Field 0: 電阻種類 [01]貼片 [02]碳膜
Field 1: 電阻值 (input, 4 chars)
